scope.target: TOOL-001 runner retention evidence and VAL-001 deterministic dependency/version consistency

steps: Add red fixtures and deterministic validator
Replace deferred runner entry with required validation
Run Windows and arrange hosted Ubuntu evidence
execution.last_completed_step: Retained the runner, replaced dependency deferral, passed 12 dependency and 23 runner fixtures, and verified the same 23/23 quick gate on Windows Git Bash and hosted Ubuntu.
execution.next_action: Activate V050-007 for the refreshed LANG-001 candidate inventory and bounded hybrid parity remediation.

results.summary: The literal runner is retained with fail-closed format/set parity; deterministic offline dependency consistency is required, and the same 23-check quick gate passes on Windows Git Bash and hosted Ubuntu.
results.residual_risk: macOS remains unverified; online currency and vulnerability state remain advisory; package-candidate PR CI remains intentionally red until V050-009 creates the governed v0.5.0 release record.
